g.text: · his firstborn, the father of Ziph
and Haran became the father of
the sons of Caleb, the son of Hur,
the scribes who lived at Jabez:
· from Hammath, of the house of…

svg.text: verse 50 — These were the sons of Caleb, the son of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah: Shobal the father of Kiriath…
names as spelled in the World English Bible
